Hero.subtitle: Strategy, aesthetics, and usability combined to optimize digital experiences that connect people with the digital world.

ProjectCard.title: Selection of case studies from 2018 to present

BentoSection.card1Title: Strategy, design and code to solve digital problems
BentoSection.card1Desc: A global view of a product's lifecycle, solving real problems through design.
BentoSection.card2Title: I integrate AI to research deeply, decide with data, and optimize digital experiences.
BentoSection.card4Desc: I work with an iterative methodology connecting research, design, data, and tech to optimize real experiences, not just interfaces.
BentoSection.tab1Desc: Discover real opportunities and outline the base strategy.
BentoSection.tab2Desc: Design and build interactive prototypes and functional code.
BentoSection.tab3Desc: Analyze metrics and usage data to validate hypotheses.
BentoSection.tab4Desc: Launch to market, iterate, and continuously improve the product.

UxBento.headerLabel: Why have a UX Engineer & Product Design Consultant on your team
UxBento.headerTitle: I design digital experiences that connect strategy, interface, and engineering
UxBento.card1Desc: I turn complex problems into clear product decisions.
UxBento.card2Desc: I connect design and front-end to validate ideas with users, business, and technical teams.
UxBento.card3Desc: I validate experiences with data, testing, and continuous improvement.
UxBento.card4Desc: I integrate AI to accelerate design, prototyping, and automation.

ServicesSection.title: I help startups and businesses define, design, and build digital products.
ServicesSection.description: I guide you through every step of the process with a strategic, technical, and user-centered approach. My approach combines strategic consulting, advanced UX/UI design, and frontend development (UX Engineering). This enables delivering realistic prototypes, validating ideas quickly, and building consistent, scalable code.
ServicesSection.service1Desc: Understanding users and business goals to align direction, structure information, and establish the right product path.
ServicesSection.service2Desc: Creating clean, intuitive interfaces and high-fidelity interactive prototypes to validate ideas before engineering.
ServicesSection.service3Desc: Writing high-quality front-end code and building solid design systems to bridge the gap between design and engineering.
ServicesSection.service4Desc: Optimizing workflows and user interfaces by leveraging artificial intelligence for advanced, efficient interactions.

Blog.title: Articles about design, technology, and trends shaping the digital future.

Tools.title: Digital solutions built from experience, design, and code.
Tools.description: A space where I gather functional products, tools, and experiments born from real needs: personal, professional, or discovered during product design processes.
Tools.cardTitle: Kōsei: Fast and organized visual maps
Tools.cardDesc: A web tool for creating sitemaps and flowcharts in an extremely agile way, ideal for structuring ideas fast.

Banner.title: Let's get in touch
Banner.subtitle: Interested in collaborating? We are ready to boost your next tech project.

Footer.projectPrompt: Do you have a project in mind?

AboutPage.title: Experience as the outcome
AboutPage.subtitle: I have traveled a path of constant evolution: learning, certifying, and collaborating with great professionals.
AboutPage.storyDesc: From small consultancies and prototypes in coffee shops to high-impact projects, always looking to learn, share and grow.
AboutPage.expDesc: Since my beginnings, I combine creativity and strategy so that every project is useful, human and memorable.
AboutPage.bioBadge: Certified UX-PM in 3 levels in User Experience by Ayer Viernes and the UX Alliance.
AboutPage.bioP1: Consultant in research, optimization, and measurement of experience for digital products based on data, design, and artificial intelligence.
AboutPage.bioP2: I collaborate with teams, entrepreneurs, and start-ups in the creation, evaluation, and continuous improvement of digital products, ensuring that every decision has a measurable impact on experience and usability for the business.

MethodologyPage.title: Methodology and professional background
MethodologyPage.subtitle: Applied design decisions, measurable improvements and usable experiences that add value to digital products and ease of use. I aim to solve real business problems, thinking of users.
MethodologyPage.methodTitle: Design with method, criteria and vision of impact
MethodologyPage.methodP1: My methodological approach is not rigid or dogmatic. I combine the base of UX with modern practices of Product Discovery, Product Delivery and UX Engineering, adapting them to the real context of each organization, team or product.
MethodologyPage.methodP2: I work from hypothesis to validation, integrating business, technology, and experience to reduce friction, accelerate decisions, and maximize value.

MethodologySchema.mainSubtitle: From idea to a digital product that generates real value.
MethodologySchema.step1Subtitle: Understand the problem and define the right opportunity.
MethodologySchema.step2Subtitle: Design and build a functional product.
MethodologySchema.step3Subtitle: Measure, optimize, and scale with real data.

CaseStudiesPage.title: Case Studies
CaseStudiesPage.subtitle: A selection of projects where I've applied strategy, design, and code to solve real problems.

ContactPage.subtitle: If you have a question, a business idea, or a project in mind, contact me and let's start building something impactful together.
ContactPage.msgCardDesc: Tell me what you are working on today, how I can support you or what you need to boost.
ContactPage.consultCardDesc: Let's review your digital product and generate Roadmaps to optimize your business.
ContactPage.meetCardDesc: A virtual coffee, schedule an available time and let's talk calmly about what you need.

BlogPage.title: Blog
BlogPage.subtitle: Here I share my knowledge, reflections, and learnings about design, technology, and digital product development.
